summary.shape_sentence: Bearish morning liquidation into a deep low, followed by a partial midday/afternoon recovery that stalled below the open.

goat.note: Standout move was the morning liquidation from the failed open into the 10:30 low.

red_circles.behavior: No explicit red-circle labels visible; bearish behavior centered on early rejection near 25,680 and lower-high continuation into the 10:00 selloff.

green_circles.behavior: No explicit green-circle labels visible; bullish behavior centered on the 10:30 washout low and later higher-low defense near 13:15.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: No visible orange bank icons; implied supply was respected near 25,560-25,685 and not reclaimed into the close.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: No visible blue bank icons; implied demand near 25,285-25,320 held after the morning flush.

time_markers.10am_blue: Active downside expansion below the open, with price accelerating toward the morning low.
time_markers.12pm_red: Lunch rotation after the first recovery, holding above the LOD but not reclaiming the open.
time_markers.2pm_green: Constructive afternoon recovery phase, pushing toward the best post-flush highs.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Bearish close near 25,494, below the open and below afternoon resistance.

tags.banks_broken: early support broke during the 10:00 liquidation

takeaway: Bearish liquidation day with a sharp morning washout and afternoon repair attempt; failed open into capitulation low, then controlled recovery that could not reclaim the opening range.
